creator: freebsd-bugs@joe.mulloy.me
text:
(In reply to Andrey V. Elsukov from comment #3)
Thanks for the patch to bird. It's working for the IPv4 version of bird but I'm still having trouble with the IPv6 version, bird6. The bird6 package is a subordinate package so it should get the same patches, correct?

I'm curious why this wasn't an issue with the old kernel code, but I'm glad it's working. Now that I'm getting a better understanding of how this works it seems I could have also used the setkey utility instead of having bird handle the md5 signature stuff.

Thanks
